sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_conditional (id Int32, value Int32) ENGINE = Memory;
UPDATE test_conditional SET value = (value < 20 ? value + 5 : value - 5) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, value, (value < 15 ? 'Low' : 'High') AS value_status FROM test_conditional;
SELECT id, (value % 2 == 0 ? 'Even' : 'Odd') AS parity FROM test_conditional WHERE id > 1;
